text:
There once was a girl named Alice who loved watching wildlife. She lived in a city zoo, so she rarely got to see them in the wild. One weekend she decided to go hiking in the nearby park to see more animals. She stumbled across a little brook singing songs, filled with tiny water dragons.

Alice listened and waited patiently, her ears perked up. Then suddenly, a tiny dragon leaped onto her shoulder and sang a merry tune. It chirped, "Hi there! Want to play?"

Alice laughed and nodded. She decided to stay a while just to enjoy the experience. She played hide-and-seek with the dragons, watching them glide through the reeds.

Towards dusk, she saw a mother dragon swooping towards her feathers. It gave her a big hug and said, "You're an amazing friend. Just listen to my playlist. We've got 'Wildlife Serenade' and 'The River Song!'"

Alice couldn't help but laugh. They listened together
